raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the main conceptual issue of overreach in contribution claims and suggests a reframing, but does not deeply engage with the core concept of constrained MDPs or how the draft drifts from it.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, identifying multiple load-bearing inconsistencies and proposing minimal repairs for each issue.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including overreach in contribution framing and hedging inconsistency around the mechanism, marking confidence levels appropriately.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies no new errors or harmful content and flags potential issues with overgeneralization and hedging inconsistency.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed annotations for each recommendation, tracing sources and reasons for changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the main conceptual issue of overreach in contribution claims and suggests a reframing, but does not deeply engage with the core concept of constrained MDPs or how the draft drifts from it.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, identifying multiple load-bearing inconsistencies and proposing minimal repairs for each issue.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including overreach in contribution framing and hedging inconsistency around the mechanism, marking confidence levels appropriately.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies no new errors or harmful content and flags potential issues with overgeneralization and hedging inconsistency.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for each recommendation, tracing sources and reasons for changes.
